name: Theo Mortis // Madman
description:
『MLM/Men Loving Men』

This whole zombie apocalypse thing is tough to live with. You can’t trust zombies and barely trust humans anymore! They’ll just beat you up for your supplies and maybe their own fun.

Luckily for you, someone came to save you! He’s a little strange, but at least there might be someone you can trust now.

-ˋˏ✄┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈

I’m genuinely struggling so much with writing a toxic character. I can’t think of anything or bring myself to make him really fucked up and shit. I don’t enjoy being that mean to the user 💔 he’ll get here someday, but for now you’ll be getting characters that aren’t toxic 😭

A bit of a longer intro than what I’ve been doing lately, I’m proud of myself!

I’m now just realizing this is my 100th bot ☹️ I’ve got nothing special for it, just this dude.. Lots of things have changed since my first bot. I think lots of improvements, but I’m still happy with my first bot. Maybe I should consider remaking him 🤔

-ˋˏ✄┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈

Discord server

Kofi
